data.title: Susan G. Komen to host MORE THAN PINK Walk in Oklahoma City aiming to raise $1.13M for breast cancer research.
data.description: In 2025, Susan G. Komen® will host the Oklahoma City MORE THAN PINK Walk to bring together breast cancer survivors, individuals with metastatic breast cancer (MBC), and supporters. The event is set to raise $1.13 million for Komen's mission to fund lifesaving initiatives. This gathering aims to unite the community and generate essential funds to support Komen's impactful work in the fight against breast cancer.

data.title: Zebu Live 2025 hosts UK's biggest Web3 Summit with industry giants like Coinbase, Solana. London, Sept 18, 2025.
data.description: A highly anticipated blockchain summit in London has brought together key figures in the crypto world, prominent industry leaders, and influential political voices to spearhead innovation in fintech. Taking place on September 18, 2025, the event named Zebu Live is being hailed as one of the top Web3 conferences in the UK. The summit has announced an impressive roster of speakers and sponsors, showcasing the participation of notable personalities and companies in the sector. Keep abreast of the latest developments at this high-profile gathering where significant discussions on the future of fintech are taking place.

data.title: Cinterra appoints Michael Rothwell as CFO after interim tenure, specializing in solar and electrical services.
data.description: In Hope Mills, North Carolina on September 18, 2025, it was announced by Cinterra, a prominent company in utility-scale solar and electrical infrastructure services, that Michael Rothwell has been named as the Chief Financial Officer (CFO). This decision follows his effective tenure in the interim position.

data.title: dunnhumby launches Incubate program in Bentonville, Arkansas to develop breakthrough technologies with startups.
data.description: In Bentonville, Arkansas, dunnhumby, a prominent company in Customer Data Science, has introduced dunnhumby Incubate, a fresh incubation initiative aimed at identifying and collaboratively developing pioneering technologies with forward-thinking specialists, innovators, and startup creators. Managed by dunnhumby ventures, the organization's platform for innovation and venture capital, dunnhumby Incubate provides a distinctive platform for emerging businesses in the data science and AI sectors to flourish. This novel program enables early-stage companies to access resources and expertise to drive their growth journey.

data.title: Medford named "Top Small Town" by Sunset Magazine's 2025 Travel Awards, praised for charm and city-break appeal.
data.description: Medford, Oregon, known as a charming city-break getaway, has received high praise as "Top Small Town" by Sunset Magazine, gaining national recognition for its appeal. The Heart of the Rogue has been celebrated for its charm and offerings in both print and digital coverage. This accolade comes as a significant achievement for Medford, showcasing its allure to a wider audience. The city's recognition is a testament to its appeal, attracting visitors with its unique offerings and appealing atmosphere. Such acknowledgment highlights the increasing popularity of Medford as a travel destination.

data.title: Biogen acquires Alcyone for $85M, gains rights to ThecaFlex DRx implant for drug delivery, potentially changing Spinraza treatment.
data.description: Biogen Inc. has announced its acquisition of Alcyone Therapeutics for $85 million, with additional milestone payments tied to the development and regulatory approval of ThecaFlex DRx and other pipeline products. This acquisition gives Biogen full rights to ThecaFlex DRx. The companies are currently collaborating on ThecaFlex DRx, an implantable subcutaneous port and catheter device for the intrathecal delivery of ASOs. This device aims to offer an alternative to repeated lumbar punctures, potentially improving the patient experience. The FDA has also recently implemented stricter safety guidelines for Biogen's Alzheimer's therapy Leqembi.

data.title: Clinical.ly held inaugural Research Working Group meeting for research sites to shape future, in NY on Sept 18, 2025.
data.description: A recent meeting held by Clinical.ly, a prominent provider of user-friendly clinical research technology, marked the conclusion of its first Clinical.ly Research Working Group session. This quarterly event offers research sites a platform to actively influence the direction of clinical advancements. The meeting took place in New York on September 18, 2025.

data.title: First Street, a leading provider of physical climate risk data, expands globally with new London office.
data.description: First Street, a leading enterprise provider of physical climate risk data, has recently made its data available globally after transitioning from a nonprofit organization. The data, which is used by millions in the United States daily, can now be accessed from anywhere worldwide. This expansion comes as part of First Street's efforts to widen its reach and make its valuable information more easily accessible. The transition took place on September 18, 2025, and marks a significant step for the company as it continues to grow and serve a larger audience.

data.title: CTEK returns to SEMA 2025 with global product debuts, U.S. launches, and a special vehicle reveal at booth #23933 in Chicago.
data.description: CTEK, a renowned provider of battery management solutions, is set to showcase its latest products and a special vehicle at the 2025 SEMA Show in Chicago. Attendees should mark their calendars for this event happening on September 18, 2025. CTEK will be exhibiting in Central Hall booth #23933, promising an exciting lineup for visitors. This return marks a significant moment for the company at a prominent industry event, garnering attention from a large audience. Be sure not to miss out on this opportunity to witness CTEK's innovations firsthand.

data.title: Boba POPS® partners with Classic Wines of California for distribution, offering patented liqueur-filled popping boba.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on September 18, 2025, Raymond Rozycki, CEO of Unifying Spirits, revealed that Classic Wines would serve as the distributor for Boba POPS® in California. Boba POPS stands out as the sole patented liqueur-filled popping boba globally. This move comes after a successful year with growing sales figures.
Trump: The US is so strong, we can get people to do things.

NVIDIA CEO said the ARM chip roadmap will continue, confirming long-term plans. He added that NVIDIA has been collaborating with Intel for nearly a year while still reviewing Intel’s foundry technology.

data.title: Cars.com highlights top EV picks as 50% of shoppers speed up purchases due to $7,500 federal tax credit expiring Sept. 30, 2025.
data.description: In Chicago on September 18, 2025, Cars.com™, a car-shopping platform listed on the NYSE under the symbol CARS, shared insights on the electric vehicle market. As the federal EV tax credit expires on September 30, 2025, the report highlighted potential savings of up to $7,500 for new electric vehicles and $4,000 for used ones.
Onex Partners buying Integrated Specialty Coverages, deal worth millions.

data.title: CUPE urges Alberta to heed recommendations after Calgary care worker stabbed 19 times by client with violent history.
data.description: In Calgary, a care worker named Deborah Onwu was tragically killed by a client, Brandon Newman, in October 2019. Onwu, who was an employee of Woods Homes Society, was stabbed 19 times while working alone with Newman, who was a resident of the society at the time. Newman had a troubling history of violence, along with various cognitive and mental health challenges. The union representing Onwu is urging the province to adopt and execute the recommendations outlined in the recently released inquiry report regarding this incident.

data.title: XRP surges with debut of first U.S. spot ETF; Rex-Osprey XRP ETF sees high demand, pushing prices up.
data.description: The value of XRP has seen a notable increase following the launch of the inaugural U.S. ETF that offers direct exposure to the coin. This ETF, known as the Rex-Osprey XRP ETF, has contributed to a surge in the XRP price.

data.title: Supio expands AI products at Supio Summit 2025 with new features for law firms in $61B US personal injury market.
data.description: In New York today, Supio revealed the enhancement of its platform and the introduction of its CaseAware AI at Supio Summit 2025. The upgrades consist of a fresh litigation agent suite, new case intake suite, rapid drafting tools, deposition analysis, and a risk-free pricing model aimed at speeding up the integration of legal AI within plaintiff-side personal injury firms. These launches signify a turning point for the $61 billion U.S. personal injury sector, wherein legal firms are under increasing pressure.

data.title: Informa TechTarget's Reach 2025 Virtual Event will focus on trust, AI, and B2B engagement trends.
data.description: A virtual event called Reach 2025 by Informa TechTarget in Newton, Massachusetts, offers valuable insights for Go-To-Market (GTM) teams on how to establish trust and generate measurable demand in the fast-changing B2B sector. The event is designed to equip professionals with strategies to navigate the evolving landscape.

data.title: AI model by FIU predicts floods in Florida's canals, transforming responses. Published in Journal of Hydroinformatics.
data.description: In Miami on September 18, 2025, experts at Florida International University have created a new artificial intelligence (AI) tool that has the potential to revolutionize flood forecasting and management in Florida's extensive canal network. The innovative model, highlighted in the Journal of Engineering, offers a more accurate method for predicting and addressing flooding incidents, saving time and resources. This cutting-edge technology showcases the university's commitment to advancing flood prevention strategies and can greatly benefit water managers in the region.
